task.title: Move scoped claims to runtime storage
task.summary: Relocate scoped change claim persistence from a truth-looking top-level path into explicit runtime/ephemeral storage consumed by graph/status as derived input.

goal.outcome: Scoped claims are stored as ephemeral runtime input while graph/status remain derived read-only views.
acceptance: Claim persistence path is under `.codewiki/runtime/claims.json` or equivalent explicit runtime location.
Docs/config/templates/gitignore stop presenting the old top-level claim file as state truth.
Graph/status/state still derive claim views from runtime claim input.
Smoke tests use the runtime claim path and still cover release/expiry/overlap behavior.
non_goals: Do not store claims only in generated graph.
Do not keep a backwards-compatible alias for the old top-level claim path.

summary: Moved scoped change claim persistence to `.codewiki/runtime/claims.json` so claims are clearly ephemeral runtime coordination input. Graph/status/state remain derived read-only views; active docs/source/tests/config no longer present the old top-level claim file as state truth.
checks_run: grep active docs/source/tests/config for old top-level claim path

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Claim persistence path is under `.codewiki/runtime/claims.json` or equivalent explicit runtime location.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: extensions/codewiki/src/application/claims.ts claimsFilePath returns `${project.metaRoot}/runtime/claims.json`; smoke expiry fixture uses `.codewiki/runtime/claims.json`.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Docs/config/templates/gitignore stop presenting the old top-level claim file as state truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: README, system docs, config, templates, gateway manifest, and .gitignore use runtime claim path; stale grep for old top-level claim path is clean in active docs/source/tests/config.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph/status/state still derive claim views from runtime claim input.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Current-source graph rebuild reports views.claims with zero active claims and no conflicts; claim code still feeds rebuild-derived graph/status/state views.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Smoke tests use the runtime claim path and still cover release/expiry/overlap behavior.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npm test passes with smoke coverage for claim create/read-write warning/write-write block/release/expired runtime fixture.

risks: Pi reload still required before live tool schema/behavior includes codewiki_claim and runtime path changes.

commit.title: fix(claims): store scoped leases under runtime state
commit.body: Move scoped change claims to .codewiki/runtime/claims.json so graph/status remain derived views over ephemeral coordination input. Update docs, config, templates, gateway manifest, smoke tests, and gitignore. Checks: tsc, architecture, npm test, current-source graph rebuild, stale-path grep.

pr.title: fix(claims): store scoped leases under runtime state
pr.body: Move scoped change claims to .codewiki/runtime/claims.json so graph/status remain derived views over ephemeral coordination input. Update docs, config, templates, gateway manifest, smoke tests, and gitignore. Checks: tsc, architecture, npm test, current-source graph rebuild, stale-path grep.

validation_verdict.rationale: Runtime claim store refinement keeps claims ephemeral and graph/status derived.
